label: 7386 to 7386k Transferred
notes: CodificationSections 7386 to 7386k, , §§ 3620–3631, , , were renumbered sections 4701 to 4712, respectively, of by –(C), , , and were formerly classified to sections 2741 to 2752, respectively, of Title 50, War and National Defense.
